integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with the OpenCAD GUI.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual OpenCAD application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Lamar Davis is a verified male character from GTA V, associated with Los Santos. The vehicle model 'Baller' is also verified as a real GTA vehicle (canonically made by Gallivanter, though the task specifies Bravado). The agent MUST strictly follow the task description's specific values (DOB: 1988-09-05, Make: Bravado, Plate: LAM-8844, Warrant: Receiving Stolen Property) even if they conflict with GTA canon.
